SHARE_USER.description: Samba username for the admin's Windows/macOS network drive

SHARE_PASSWORD.description: Samba password — auto-generated. Note it during install: you'll type it once per Windows/macOS machine when mounting the share. Use the regenerate icon if you want a custom value before deploy.

FILEBROWSER_PORT.description: FileBrowser HTTP port. FB binds on 0.0.0.0 because NPM lives in its own pod netns and can't reach the host loopback. Direct LAN hits without the Remote-User header set by NPM/Authelia are rejected by FB's proxy-auth mode (403), so this is not an auth-bypass.

FILEBROWSER_ADMIN_USER.description: LLDAP username that gets pre-promoted to FileBrowser admin. Defaults to the LLDAP admin so the wizard's only auto-created user lands as the FB admin too — when they first log in via SSO, FB matches the existing admin record.

FILEBROWSER_SUBDOMAIN.description: Subdomain for FileBrowser. Authelia forward-auth in the proxy snippet means SSO login → FileBrowser session in one step.
